dict.string: NOOP connects directly to your WHOOP strap over Bluetooth to read heart rate, R-R intervals, battery, and sensor data locally on your iPhone. Nothing leaves your device.
NOOP reads Apple Health sleep analysis on-device to calculate a sleep score. Recovery, strain, activity, workouts, HRV, and resting heart rate come from your WHOOP strap.
NOOP can export WHOOP heart rate, HRV, respiratory rate, detected sleep stages, workouts, and active energy to Apple Health for on-device sleep and recovery analysis.
NOOP uses your location during outdoor runs and hikes to record your route, distance, and pace.
